jobs.title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026, Anganwadi Worker and Helper Posts
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”

The application should be submitted to: The Office of the Child Development Project Officer, POSHAN Project URI, near Toll Post Lagama, within 15 days from the date of publication of the notice, and obtain a proper receipt.

jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the RRC Jaipur website and select the “Scouts & Guides Quota” notification. Register through New Registration and obtain login details. Login and fill out the form; fill out separate forms for Level 2 and Level 1. Upload the required documents (educational, Scout/Guide certificate, caste/income, etc.). Pay the application fee online, submit the application, and save the printout.

jobs.title: RRC Jaipur Cultural Quota Recruitment 2026-27, Check Eligibility Criteria & How to Apply
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the RRC Jaipur website (www.rrcjaipur.in) and click on the Cultural Quota 2026-27 notification link. Click on New User Registration and fill in the required details, including name, email, mobile number, etc. Note down the registration ID and password received via email/SMS upon completing the registration. Log in and upload the required documents (photo, signature, qualification-related certificates, etc.). Pay the application fee online. Submit the application and preserve the application receipt/email.

jobs.how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below. Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.). Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview. Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.” The application should be submitted to: Office of the Civil Surgeon, Bhiwani

vacancy_details.eligibility: Bachelor’s degree in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human Development / Nursing.Candidates with experience in the relevant field are preferred.Working knowledge of computers and knowledge of government health programs is desirable.
B.Sc. MLT/DMLT/BMLS/MMLS or a recognized equivalent in Medical Lab Technology.Experience in the relevant field is required.See the official notification for detailed eligibility and experience.

jobs.title: Chandigarh Police Vacancy 2026, Apply For Constable and ASI 400 Posts

application_fees.payment_mode: Online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI.

jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://chandigarhpolice.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.
jobs.jobs_info: Chandigarh Police Vacancy 2026:The Chandigarh Police Department will soon issue a notification for the posts of Constable and ASI. This recruitment drive comprises 400 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before the stipulated deadline. All relevant information regarding the Chandigarh Police Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI.

jobs.title: JANMITRA UDYOG LLP Work From Home Vacancy 2026, Apply Online
jobs.how_to_apply: आधिकारिक पोर्टल पर जाएं। रजिस्ट्रेशन करें। अपनी जानकारी भरें। उपलब्ध अवसर देखें। इच्छित कार्य के लिए आवेदन करें।
jobs.jobs_info: JANMITRA UDYOG LLP Work From Home Vacancy 2026: मुख्यमंत्री वर्क फ्रॉम होम स्कीम 2026 के तहत, जयपुर जिले की जनमित्र उद्योग LLP ने डिजिटल शॉप ऑपरेटर के पद के लिए भर्ती निकाली है। यह मौका महिलाओं को घर से या डिजिटल तरीके से काम करने का मौका देगा, जिसके लिए कुल 150 पद हैं। इस पद के लिए कम से कम पढ़ाई की योग्यता 10वीं पास है। अप्लाई करने के लिए पहले का कोई अनुभव ज़रूरी नहीं है। इच्छुक महिला उम्मीदवार 30 जून, 2026 तक ऑनलाइन अप्लाई कर सकती हैं।
